llvm-ar qc libfse.a  CMakeFiles/fse.dir/debug.c.o CMakeFiles/fse.dir/entropy_common.c.o CMakeFiles/fse.dir/fseU16.c.o CMakeFiles/fse.dir/fse_compress.c.o CMakeFiles/fse.dir/fse_decompress.c.o CMakeFiles/fse.dir/hist.c.o CMakeFiles/fse.dir/huf_compress.c.o CMakeFiles/fse.dir/huf_decompress.c.o
llvm-ranlib libfse.a
